name: Shenzhen Farben Information Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Farben Information Technology Co.,Ltd. provides software technology services and solutions worldwide. It offers solutions in the areas of personalized systems, data warehouse upgrade, data management analysis, E-commerce website, data management platform management, and big data platform building. The company also offers IT, consulting, cloud, and product development services. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
